scripts.capture:demo: pnpm --filter @ghostframes/runtime build && node packages/ghostframes/dist/build.js capture --config apps/demo/ghostframes.capture.config.mjs
scripts.quality:validate: pnpm --filter @ghostframes/cli build && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const cp=require('node:child_process'); const manifestPath='apps/demo/lib/ghostframes/generated/manifest.json'; const manifest=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(manifestPath,'utf8')); const requiredKeys=Object.keys(manifest.entries ?? {}).sort(); const result=cp.spawnSync(process.execPath,['packages/cli/dist/index.js','validate','--manifest',manifestPath,'--required-keys',requiredKeys.join(','),'--min-coverage','1','--max-invalid','0','--max-size-kb','512','--json-out','.tmp/ghostframes/validate.json','--text-out','.tmp/ghostframes/validate.txt'],{stdio:'inherit'}); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
scripts.quality:diff: pnpm --filter @ghostframes/cli build && node -e "const cp=require('node:child_process'); const baseManifest=process.env.QUALITY_BASE_MANIFEST ?? 'apps/demo/lib/ghostframes/generated/manifest.json'; const candidateManifest=process.env.QUALITY_CANDIDATE_MANIFEST ?? 'apps/demo/lib/ghostframes/generated/manifest.json'; const result=cp.spawnSync(process.execPath,['packages/cli/dist/index.js','diff','--base',baseManifest,'--candidate',candidateManifest,'--max-changed','0','--json-out','.tmp/ghostframes/diff.json','--text-out','.tmp/ghostframes/diff.txt'],{stdio:'inherit'}); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
scripts.quality:report: pnpm --filter @ghostframes/cli build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js report --validate-json .tmp/ghostframes/validate.json --diff-json .tmp/ghostframes/diff.json --format json --out .tmp/ghostframes/report.json
scripts.quality:gate: pnpm quality:validate && pnpm quality:diff && pnpm quality:report
scripts.stabilize:ready: pnpm --filter @ghostframes/react test -- src/__tests__/resolver.test.ts src/__tests__/manifest-resolver.test.ts && pnpm --filter @ghostframes/cli test -- src/__tests__/route-crawler.test.ts src/__tests__/manifest-writer.test.ts src/__tests__/capture-command.test.ts src/__tests__/report-command.test.ts && pnpm --filter @ghostframes/core test -- src/__tests__/manifest-validator.test.ts && pnpm --filter demo typecheck && pnpm resolver:perf && pnpm quality:slo
scripts.rollout-control-plane:ready: pnpm --filter @ghostframes/cli test -- src/rollout/__tests__/control-plane.test.ts src/rollout/__tests__/policy-resolver.test.ts src/rollout/__tests__/decision-gate.test.ts src/__tests__/rollout-command.test.ts && pnpm --filter @ghostframes/cli typecheck && pnpm --filter @ghostframes/cli build
scripts.hybrid-runtime-telemetry:ready: pnpm --filter @ghostframes/react test -- src/__tests__/resolver.test.ts src/__tests__/AutoSkeleton.test.tsx && pnpm --filter @ghostframes/react typecheck && pnpm --filter @ghostframes/react build && pnpm --filter demo typecheck
scripts.facade-contract:ready: pnpm turbo run build --filter=@ghostframes/runtime && pnpm turbo run test --filter=@ghostframes/runtime && pnpm turbo run typecheck --filter=@ghostframes/runtime
scripts.single-package:ready: pnpm --filter @ghostframes/runtime build && pnpm --filter @ghostframes/runtime test && pnpm --filter demo build
scripts.validate: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm test
